generated_oml:
instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical Living Lab building infrastructure in the AECO domain"
    base:contains PostOccupancySensors, LightingControlSystem
]

instance PostOccupancySensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensors providing real-time environmental data integrated into BIM models for monitoring and control."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PostOccupancySensorsDataTransmitted
]

instance PostOccupancySensorsDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PostOccupancySensors
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time environmental data from post-occupancy sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PostOccupancySensorsDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMTools
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling assets enriched with runtime metadata for middleware, sensor configurations, and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT data exchange middleware for real-time transmission of sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, NonVisualHealthEffectManagementService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT data exchange middleware for real-time transmission of sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, NonVisualHealthEffectManagementService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization engine for interactive visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance BIMTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Tools for modeling building information"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, NonVisualHealthEffectManagementService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automated transformation pipelines for model-driven deployment and runtime configuration management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelDrivenDeploymentProcess, RuntimeConfigurationManagementService
]

instance LightingControlSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators and controllers for lighting systems modeled in BIM as part of Building Control Systems (BCS), enabling real-time control signals to physical infrastructure."
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, HealthEffectsInsight, AdjustBuildingOperationsAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy, visual comfort, and health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, HealthEffectsInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy optimization services"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visual comfort adjustment services"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortInsight, AdjustLightingAction
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Non-visual health effect management using reinforcement learning"
    DTDFVocab:provides HealthEffectsInsight, AdjustHealthAction
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization via Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance ModelDrivenDeploymentProcess : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automating BIM model validation, metadata extraction, and runtime artifact generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentInsight
]

instance RuntimeConfigurationManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Allows service updates without full redeployment"
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeConfigurationManagementInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy optimization"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for visual comfort"
]

instance HealthEffectsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for health effects"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of building data and insights"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for building operations"
]

instance DeploymentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Deployment process insights"
]

instance RuntimeConfigurationManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Runtime configuration management insights"
]

instance AdjustLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time control signals to physical lighting infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustHealthAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment for non-visual health effects using reinforcement learning"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustBuildingOperationsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust building operations based on DT insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the Digital Twin and transmitted to Building Control Systems (BCS) actuators through Eclipse Hono and Ditto, enabling real-time adjustment of physical building operations."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with physical assets, processing sensor data and control signals with minimal latency for continuous operational updates."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular, service-oriented architecture where BIM serves as the semantic backbone, integrated with Eclipse Hono/Ditto for bidirectional data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, and customizable services via standardized extension points."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire building life cycle, including design, construction, operation, and refurbishment phases, through continuous data integration and model updates."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric; synchronization techniques address semantic drift to maintain alignment between digital models and physical counterparts."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware enabling real-time data exchange for bidirectional communication between physical and virtual systems."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external IoT platforms and BIM systems through standardized extension points, enabling interoperability across heterogeneous systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to AECO-specific standards like BIM; absence of standardized integration frameworks addressed through standardized extension points for modular service integration."
]
